summary: Implemented the 9 transcendence commands (week, next, agenda, conflicts, away, ical, since, owed, deadlines) plus shared calendar-fetch/render helpers.
reason: The generator scaffolds novel-feature commands as TODO stubs; these are the hand-built differentiators that merge the schedule across all the user's teams, do date math, detect conflicts, export iCal, and roll up dues.
validated_outcome: go test ./internal/cli/... passes; live dogfood 122/122; agenda --days 45 returns real team events.
